title: The Epidemic Diseases Act, 1897
full_text: The Epidemic Diseases Act, 1897 महामारी अधिनियम,1897 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189703 Act Number: 03 Enactment Date: 1897-02-04 Act Year: 1897 Short Title: The Epidemic Diseases Act, 1897 Hindi Title: महामारी अधिनियम,1897 Long Title: An Act to provide for the better prevention of the spread of Dangerous Epidemic Diseases. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 04-02-1897 Last Updated: 14-01-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Epidemic Diseases Act, 1897 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 1A. Definitions. Section 2. Power to take special measures and prescribe regulations as to dangerous epidemic disease. Section 2A. Powers of Central Government. Section 2B. Prohibition of violence against healthcare service personnel and damage to property Section 3. Penalty. Section 3A. Cognizance, investigation and trial of offences. Section 3B. Composition of certain offences. Section 3C. Presumption as to certain offences. Section 3D. Presumption of culpable mental state. Section 3E. Compensation for acts of violence. Section 4. Protection to persons acting under Act.
